subject: Charged twice for my subscription
email_body: Hello, I noticed I was billed twice this month for my subscription. Please fix this immediately.
previous_interactions: User contacted support once about billing delay.

action.response: Hello, we sincerely apologize for the duplicate billing on your subscription. We are actively investigating this billing issue and will confirm the details with you shortly. Please allow us a moment to review your account and ensure the duplicate charge is fully resolved.
